full_text:
Ma Miao 馬邈
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Miao (馬邈). In charge of the defense of Jiangyou castle, but surrendered it to Wei, prompting his wife to commit suicide. Ma Miao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
